emails.subject: CHARM Conference Call
emails.body: Please let me know what works for you. I have a meeting Monday from 10:00 a.m. through lunch. Please advise. Forwarded by James L Bouillion/HOU/ECT on 02/07/2001 07:33 AM "Bertil Olsson" <olsson_bc@willis.com> on 02/06/2001 10:37:21 AM

emails.subject: Re: CHARM Conference Call
emails.body: Re: CHARM Conference Call Jim, I was on vacation last week. I shall be out Tuesday and Wednesday. What about a call next week? Vince James L Bouillion 02/07/2001 09:32 AM
